programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: License to Drive
programme.desc: A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite flunking his drivers test

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: The Hair Bears introduce Peevly to an imaginary 10-foot rabbit named Arnie to convince him that he is overworked and needs a vacation

programme.title: Hong 113
programme.desc: Hong 113

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Warlords - Hitler vs Stalin
programme.desc: The personalities and spectres of Adolf Hitler and Joseph Stalin loom large in the events of the twentieth Century They were similar in some respects and yet very different in others

programme.title: The Underground War - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Cities At War - Paris
programme.desc: This programme follows the award-winning trilogy whose theme was the miraculous resilience of the human spirit in the face of adversity The original trilogy examined London Berlin and Leningrad and showed how their people coped with the ravages of World War II This one-off studies Paris and the effects that the war had on the French nation

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 4
programme.desc: Part 4 Showdown in the Iron Triangle

programme.title: Follow The Flag
programme.desc: The Flag Marine Corps Documentary

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Two virginal teenagers lust after a goth girl whos obsessed with Freddy Krueger

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The Parisian underworld clashes with a greedy developer whose plans are not in line with theirs

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Bogus preacher Brother Charles preys upon the misfortune of attractive young homeless women by leading them toward prostitution under the guise of spreading brotherly love The fake priests scam comes to a sudden halt when mysterious stigmata appear on the hands of his latest flock member Alice Ames as she performs her mission

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Knight 318
programme.desc: Knight 318

programme.title: Hogans 327
programme.desc: Hogans 327

programme.title: Hogans 315
programme.desc: Hogans 315

programme.title: Mchale 403
programme.desc: Mchale 403

programme.title: Mchale 302
programme.desc: Mchale 302

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are initially honored by a visit from supposedly pro-farmer Congressional candidate Jim Slade but they decide to turn the tables when they learn that he has never been a farmer and is interested mainly in self-aggrandizement

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A chauffeur John Mills takes up with his employer Celeste Holm; an 8-year-old Keith Coogan blames himself when his parents Juliet Mills and David Hedison separate; Gopher Fred Grandy has a crush on a cover model Hayley Mills

programme.title: WKRP 121
programme.desc: WKRP 121

programme.title: WKRP 218
programme.desc: WKRP 218

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Tongues wag when a massage parlor opens up

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor quits the football team after a bad breakup with his girlfriend Aimee

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: Temperamental tennis pro Bobby Howard has been receiving threatening phone calls His coach Sid Green hires Dan to protect Bobby who doesnt want it Meanwhile Binzer tries to stop Tommy Cirkos petty larceny impersonating a minister

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A used bullet hidden in their house by a new Hart employee leads to a cat-and-mouse evening with a murderer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie panics when she discovers shes no longer blossoming It takes Larry Darryl and Darryls sage advice to break her depression George buys blue jeans

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Its Halloween and the townspeople believe the town is about to be invaded by aliens

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Worried over a threat on his life the Secret Service drafts Gunny to protect the Emir of Katodd on his unscheduled refueling stop at Camp Hollister To top things off Polly is outside with animal rights activists protesting the Emir as he is claimed to be a camel killer

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways form a band for entertainment and diversion But Gilligans drumbeats are mistaken by tribes on other islands as a declaration of war

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan head out in the ocean to a oil rig abandoned after a strange accident and find a drifting yacht with a terrified young woman aboard who says that her yacht captain was pulled off the ship by a gelatinous green sea monster which in fact was the result of the oil rig accident

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dan Mateo one of Alphas botanists believes that he can increase their food supply by communicating telepathically with his plants After passing out during one of his electronic experiments Alpha seems to become haunted by a murderous and disfigured spirit

programme.title: Deep Space
programme.desc: A spaceship with a hideous monster with an incredible appetite for flesh crashes to Earth Unsuspecting policemen Ian Mclemore and Jerry Merris investigate the wreckage They discover several small pods which they remove

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Hercules 224
programme.desc: Hercules 224

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Padar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a jack patch that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users When a Padar warrior dies it raises even more questions about the safety

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Mana forces a dying surgeon to conduct experiments on patients in his hospital attempting to implant alien embryos into human hosts

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A couple tricks Dr Kimble into helping an injured young boy who is a hemophiliac and whom they have kidnapped for a 200000 ransom

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Helping a friend keep her saloon from a crooked gambling combine Cheyenne runs it while she gets to know her daughter who for ten years has been at school back East and knows nothing of how her mother earned the money that kept her there

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Hickok falls in love with a woman who belongs to an unwanted religious group but must first settle an old score with a gunfighter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: James Woods plays the perfect homely US Navy sailor in dress blues with a bad temper along with his Navy buddies they are looking for a jeweler that closed his store a few days before they hit town Their course leads to murder anchors aweigh

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An opposition leader of an Eastern Bloc nation has been captured by the chief of the countrys secret police Also seized was microfilm with a list of people who secretly support the opposition Phelps develops a plan that plays upon the astrology obsession the nations leader has Cinnamon poses as a famous astrologer while Barney and Rollin will have to operate from the cargo compartment of a plane transporting the captured opposition leader

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are in the courtroom testifying in a case in which the probable cause for them to conduct a search of the suspects car is in question The probable cause is to be provided by a witness who is late arriving to court

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.

programme.title: HK Best Of's - Best of Submissions Fall 2015 - Episode 1 NEW
programme.desc: HK Best Of's - Best of Submissions Fall 2015 - Episode 1 NEW

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Luiz Rocha v. Myrza Tebuev

programme.desc: Rodrigo Damm v. Kultar Singh Gill

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: News off-beat stories and analysis of German and international affairs Dive deeper with our features from Europe and beyond Watch our 247 TV stream

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides race to locate the ruins of an ancient GoBotic spacecraft which was carrying a powerful weapon when it crashed into the South American jungle long ago

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: An intergalactic sports promoter captures Renegades and Guardians and pits them against each other on Gameworld

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steal a colony of metal-eating insects developed for warfare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Sly Rax disguises himself an aboriginal priest VENOM has a machine that causes a giant vortex which they use to kidnap the village people

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world
